# Rarely Done Well

> An entrepreneurship ecosystem for founders building physical goods and hospitality brands. Based in San Antonio, serving South Texas. Est. 2026.

Rarely Done Well is led by entrepreneurs with deep hands-on experience in physical goods and hospitality. It supports founders through three programs that form a natural progression: The Community is the entry point (open to any founder at any stage), The Accelerator is a structured 10-week cohort for founders 0–2 years in, and The Incubator is a year-long one-on-one strategic partnership for brands actively seeking scale. A founder can participate in one or all three depending on where they are in building their business.

The target audience across all three programs is founders building physical goods, food, beverage, or hospitality brands — primarily in San Antonio and South Texas, though partner engagements extend nationally.

In addition to its founder-facing programs, Rarely Done Well offers institutional services for cities, economic development corporations, corporations, and policymakers — including program design, ecosystem consulting, policy advisory, corporate innovation frameworks, and licensing of proven programming to other markets.

## Programs

**The Community** — $84/year membership. Monthly meetups, a curated mentor network, and a monthly newsletter. Open to any founder in food, beverage, or hospitality, whether pre-launch or already operating. Student discounts available. Best for founders who want connection and ongoing support without a structured program commitment.

**The Accelerator** — 10-week cohort program, offered Spring and Fall. Approximately 30 sessions covering knowledge, network, and operating foundation. For entrepreneurs 0–2 years in operation, or established owners rebuilding on a stronger foundation. Pricing: $1,800 full price, $600/month payment plan, $1,200 early bird or referral (limited spots), $900 student pricing, and two full scholarships awarded per cohort. Includes a money-back guarantee — if a participant completes the program and finds no tangible value, they receive a full refund. Based in San Antonio.

**The Incubator** — Year-long strategic partnership structured as a monthly retainer, scoped to each participant's needs. Not a cohort — fully individualized. For brands actively seeking scale across the whole business or within a specific vertical. Participant count is kept intentionally small. Entry is by conversation, not application.

## Partner Services

Rarely Done Well works with institutions on: economic development programming (Government & EDC), policy and advocacy advisory, corporate innovation and supplier diversity, full ecosystem design, and expansion/licensing of proven frameworks to other markets. The engagement is direct — no forms, conversation-first.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/): Mission, manifesto, and ecosystem overview
- [The Background](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/learn-more.html): Origin story, methodology, and alumni brands
- [The Community](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/community.html): Monthly membership — $84/year
- [The Accelerator](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/accelerator.html): 10-week cohort program — Spring and Fall, money-back guarantee
- [The Incubator](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/incubator.html): Year-long strategic partnership — inquiry only
- [For Partners](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/partners.html): Institutional services — economic development, ecosystem design, policy, corporate innovation
